languages.original_text: "For life is so fleeting, after all, why encumber it with more fears and regrets? This is the answer of a person rooted in reality and with a thirst for life."

languages.text: "Ведь она так коротка, зачем вмещать в нее еще страхи и сожаления? Это ответ человека, укорененного в реальности и жадного до жизни".
"For life is so fleeting, after all, why encumber it with more fears and regrets? This is the answer of a person rooted in reality and with a thirst for life."
languages.original_text: "Ведь она так коротка, зачем вмещать в нее еще страхи и сожаления? Это ответ человека, укорененного в реальности и жадного до жизни".

traits.locale_text: "For life is so fleeting, after all, why encumber it with more fears and regrets? This is the answer of a person rooted in reality and with a thirst for life."
"For life is so fleeting, after all, why encumber it with more fears and regrets? This is the answer of a person rooted in reality and with a thirst for life."
"For life is so fleeting, after all, why encumber it with more fears and regrets? This is the answer of a person rooted in reality and with a thirst for life."

languages.text: «Pues la vida ya es efímera, al fin y al cabo. ¿Por qué cargarla de miedos y pesares? Esa es la respuesta de una persona con los pies en la tierra y con pasión por la vida».
languages.original_text: "For life is so fleeting, after all, why encumber it with more fears and regrets? This is the answer of a person rooted in reality and with a thirst for life."

traits.locale_text: «Pues la vida ya es efímera, al fin y al cabo. ¿Por qué cargarla de miedos y pesares? Esa es la respuesta de una persona con los pies en la tierra y con pasión por la vida».

languages.text: “毕竟生命如此短暂，何必再给它增添更多的恐惧和遗憾呢？这种回答说明您是脚踏实地、热爱生活的人。”
languages.original_text: "For life is so fleeting, after all, why encumber it with more fears and regrets? This is the answer of a person rooted in reality and with a thirst for life."

traits.locale_text: “毕竟生命如此短暂，何必再给它增添更多的恐惧和遗憾呢？这种回答说明您是脚踏实地、热爱生活的人。”

languages.text: « La vie passe si vite, après tout, alors pourquoi nous encombrer de craintes et de regrets ? Voilà bien la réponse d'une personne ancrée dans la réalité et qui a soif de vivre. »
languages.original_text: "For life is so fleeting, after all, why encumber it with more fears and regrets? This is the answer of a person rooted in reality and with a thirst for life."

traits.locale_text: « La vie passe si vite, après tout, alors pourquoi nous encombrer de craintes et de regrets ? Voilà bien la réponse d'une personne ancrée dans la réalité et qui a soif de vivre. »

languages.text: "Wenn man bedenkt, wie flüchtig das Leben ist, wozu es mit noch mehr Ängsten und Reue beladen? Das ist die Antwort einer in der Realität verwurzelten Person mit einem Hunger nach Leben."
languages.original_text: "For life is so fleeting, after all, why encumber it with more fears and regrets? This is the answer of a person rooted in reality and with a thirst for life."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn man bedenkt, wie flüchtig das Leben ist, wozu es mit noch mehr Ängsten und Reue beladen? Das ist die Antwort einer in der Realität verwurzelten Person mit einem Hunger nach Leben."

languages.text: 「人生ははかないものなのだから、それ以上の恐れや後悔を抱く必要はない。これが現実に根ざし、生への渇望を持つ人間の答えである。」
languages.original_text: "For life is so fleeting, after all, why encumber it with more fears and regrets? This is the answer of a person rooted in reality and with a thirst for life."

traits.locale_text: 「人生ははかないものなのだから、それ以上の恐れや後悔を抱く必要はない。これが現実に根ざし、生への渇望を持つ人間の答えである。」

languages.text: "Hayat o kadar kısa ki neden onu daha fazla korku ve pişmanlıkla ağırlaştıralım? Bu, gerçekliğe kök salmış ve yaşama susuzluğu olan birinin cevabıdır."
languages.original_text: "For life is so fleeting, after all, why encumber it with more fears and regrets? This is the answer of a person rooted in reality and with a thirst for life."

traits.locale_text: "Hayat o kadar kısa ki neden onu daha fazla korku ve pişmanlıkla ağırlaştıralım? Bu, gerçekliğe kök salmış ve yaşama susuzluğu olan birinin cevabıdır."
